creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 188286
E3272, E3372

All other, except userial already in base 11.1.
Here updated E3131_INIT from U3GINIT_HUAWEISCSI to U3GINIT_HUAWEISCSI2.
E3131 share PID with E3372 (at lest with few firmwares), but U3GINIT_HUAWEISCSI2 should work and with older modems.

I check patch only with E3272 and E3372.
